sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na kha nuai kei hong seel in,
Hong huai in, avanglian na khut tawh

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tuipi hong khangin van hong gin ciang
Lauhuai huihpi kheng, i lengkhawm ding
Pasian kong neih main om hithiat ning

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khris sung bekah ka tawldam hi,
Avangliat ka theih teh ka muang hi.
Coda: Pasian kong neih ma'n om hithiat ning.
